Internal Tool

Dau Hang Item Appraiser

This tool is for Dau Hang employees and staff only. It helps identify items and estimate pricing from photos to support your day-to-day work.

⚠️
Do not rely on this tool alone

Identification, pricing, and history shown here are AI-generated estimates. They can be wrong, incomplete, or outdated. Always do your own research — check tags, materials, and comparable listings yourself — before making a final call on any item, quoting a customer, or setting a price.
